attributes.title: [Confluence Audit] md Fallback
attributes.visState: {"title": "[Confluence Audit] md Fallback", "type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "### \ud83d\udd75\ufe0f Category Fallback (Canary)  \n_Events no Layer 1 rule claimed, caught by the category tiers 127090 (security/identity) and 127091 (admin/content). A sustained spike of one summary here means Confluence introduced an event the ruleset should classify \u2014 review and add a Layer 1 rule._"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Confluence Audit Events
attributes.description: Confluence audit-log monitoring (data.conf_integration:confluence): volume, category and severity trends, top actors/summaries, security detections (admin grants, MFA-disable, exposure, app installs, API tokens), authentication and brute-force correlations, permission changes, content deletion, export/backup collection, audit-log integrity, users/groups and guest/external actors, fallback canary, and a rule/coverage reference. Ruleset 127000-127099.
